DollarAnchorKeyword.ImpliesCoreTypes Method

Definition

Namespace: Corvus.Json.CodeGeneration.Keywords
Assembly: Corvus.Text.Json.dll

ImpliesCoreTypes(TypeDeclaration)

public CoreTypes ImpliesCoreTypes(TypeDeclaration typeDeclaration)

Parameters

Name Type Description
typeDeclaration TypeDeclaration

Returns

CoreTypes

Implements

IKeyword.ImpliesCoreTypes

Applies To

Product Versions
.NET 8, 9, 10
.NET Standard 2.0
